summary: Memory Bottleneck Fix Testing Complete - All 18 backend tests passed. Key changes verified: getQuestionsByTenant removed from hot paths, replaced with department-filtered SQL queries (getQuestionsByDepartment), SQL COUNT for analytics (getQuestionCount), and pagination (getQuestionsPaginated). Frontend loads correctly with department filter and paginated responses handled properly.
critical_code_review_comments: pg-storage.ts: getQuestionsPaginated (line 275-280) correctly uses SQL LIMIT/OFFSET for pagination
pg-storage.ts: getQuestionCount (line 283-290) uses SQL COUNT(*) instead of loading all questions
pg-storage.ts: getQuestionsByCreator (line 292-296) filters by createdBy at SQL level
pg-storage.ts: getAnalytics (line 951) uses SQL COUNT for totalQuestions instead of loading all questions
pg-storage.ts: getSubjectsByTenant (line 1125-1143) uses SQL GROUP BY instead of loading all questions
routes.ts: GET /api/questions (line 281-307) returns array for departmentId filter, paginated for admin
questions.tsx: Handles both array and paginated response formats (line 72-78)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data. Department 3bedf6c1-d838-4851-a27d-9774fa2b027a has 22 questions (15 approved, 7 pending).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Memory bottleneck fix fully implemented and tested. Key architectural change: getQuestionsByTenant is no longer called in hot paths. All routes use department-filtered queries (getQuestionsByDepartment), SQL aggregation (COUNT, GROUP BY), or pagination (getQuestionsPaginated). Total questions in DB: 1872. Department IX_Science has 22 questions. Frontend correctly handles both array and paginated response formats.

teacher_questions.returns: Only questions created by logged-in teacher

analytics_total_questions.returns: totalQuestions using SQL COUNT (not loading all questions)

academic_coverage.returns: Coverage data with sections, lessons, topics breakdown

check_duplicate.returns: Duplicate check result with departmentId filter

questions_page.handles_paginated_response: Frontend correctly handles both array and paginated formats

blueprint_coverage_page.shows: Department overview, coverage percentages, section/lesson breakdown

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/analytics - Returns totalQuestions via SQL COUNT
POST /api/questions/check-duplicate - Returns duplicate check with departmentId

known_limitations.s3_upload: S3/image upload not tested (missing AWS keys per instructions)
